subject: docs(todo): remove stale fuzzy-matching item — semantic embeddings already subsume it
body:
The backlog entry predates the Semantic Duplicate Detection milestone.
mergeService.ts:13 now explicitly rejects Levenshtein/fuzzy matching in
favor of sentence-transformer embeddings (cosine similarity on 384-dim
vectors via all-MiniLM-L6-v2). Both import-time matching and the
standalone Find Duplicates scanner use the same path. The TODO item
was carried over and never cleaned up.

Tags: docs, cleanup, todo
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: alpha-debug-system
Semver: patch

title: remove stale fuzzy-matching item — semantic embeddings already subsume it
